# 第四章 基于联邦知识图谱对齐的全球海洋法智慧服务系统

## 4.1 需求分析与应用场景

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.1-background.qmd >}}

## 4.2 系统总体架构设计

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.2/4.2.1-architecture.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.2/4.2.2-architecture.qmd >}}

## 4.3 核心功能模块实现

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.3/4.3.1-modules.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.3/4.3.2-modules.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.3/4.3.3-modules.qmd >}}

## 4.4 系统演示

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.4/4.4.1-demonstration.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.4/4.4.2-demonstration.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.4/4.4.3-demonstration.qmd >}}


## 4.5 本章小结

{{< include chapters/ch4/4.5-summary.qmd >}}
